narrative:
Deerfield Township has 1,787 registered voters, with 59.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a clear Republican lean of 10.2 percentage points.
